creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 211028
svn diff to upgrade to 0.63.1

gohugo has been updated to 0.63.1
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.63.1)

Change log:
 - considerably faster and more memory effective
 - deps: Make the build flags shared between sites
 - Fix baseof with regular define regression
 - More, see notes on Github

- portlint: OK (looks fine.)
- testport: OK (poudriere: <11.3-RELEASE, 11.3-STABLE, 12.0-RELEASE, 12.1-RELEASE, 12.1-STABLE, and 13.0-CURRENT>, < amd64/i386 >, <manpages + with/without extended> tested)
